subcodes.first_line: Verily, God hath ordained a time for every matter. When the promise cometh to pass, that which hath been decreed in the Kingdom of His command shall be revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الله قد قدر لکل امر میقات اذا جاء الوعد ینزل ما قدر فی ملکوت القضاء لاهل
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement
